item.title: Spectrum Electrical Industries Ltd Hits Day Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Spectrum Electrical Industries Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline, hitting its day low as the stock fell sharply by 17.05% on 24 Apr 2026. This underperformance came amid broader market weakness, with the Sensex also retreating but to a lesser extent, reflecting immediate price pressures and subdued market sentiment towards the stock. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 24 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,626.10, reflecting a 3.2% drop from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid prevailing bearish sentiment and technical pressures. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Themis Biosyn Ltd Surges 9.74% to Day's High of Rs 360.75 — Outperforms Sector by 10.65 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.07% on 24 Apr 2026, while Gujarat Themis Biosyn Ltd surged 9.74%, outperforming its Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector by 10.65 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price of Rs 1,092.00 on 24 April 2026, reflecting robust market momentum and sustained investor confidence in the capital markets sector. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 2,145 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Fredun Pharmaceuticals Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price of ₹2,145 on 24 April 2026, reflecting a remarkable journey of sustained growth and robust financial performance within the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 223.65
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 223.65 on 24 Jun 2026, Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum despite a broadly declining Sensex backdrop. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Pan Electronics (India) Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly positive market environment, Pan Electronics (India) Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 30.01 on 24 Apr 2026, marking a steep decline of over 50% from its peak of Rs 77.13 in the past year. This sharp underperformance contrasts starkly with the Sensex, which has declined by just 3.6% over the same period. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Agio Paper & Industries Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Agio Paper & Industries Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.3.42 on 24 April 2026, marking a significant downturn amid broader sectoral and market pressures. The stock’s performance reflects ongoing challenges within the company’s fundamentals and technical indicators, as it continues to underperform both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Blue Chip India Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: While the broader market struggles with modest declines, Blue Chip India Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 3.02 on 24 Apr 2026, marking a steep 55.26% drop over the past year and underscoring persistent headwinds for this micro-cap NBFC. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Sar Auto Products Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 2335 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 1445 to a fresh peak of Rs 2335 today, Sar Auto Products Ltd has delivered an 18.33% gain over the past year, outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 3.59%. This milestone reflects a robust price momentum supported by a confluence of technical indicators signalling strength across multiple timeframes. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rekvina Labs Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 45.74
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 45.74 on 24 Apr 2026, Rekvina Labs Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum despite a broadly weakening market backdrop. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 99.1
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching a new 52-week high of Rs.99.1 on 24 April 2026, marking a remarkable rally in the edible oil sector amid a challenging broader market environment. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Oxford Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 17.25
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Oxford Industries Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 17.25 on 24 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 50.26% gain over this period. This milestone is underscored by a strong alignment of technical indicators that have propelled the stock well above all key moving averages despite a broader market retreat. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Shantai Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 77.37
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Shantai Industries Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 77.37 today, marking a remarkable ascent from its 52-week low of Rs 11.15. This rally, driven by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum, stands out amid a broader market that is currently under pressure. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Covidh Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 75.64
item.description: With a sustained rally over the past 21 trading sessions, Covidh Technologies Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 75.64 on 24 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 51.31% gain during this period. This price milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum that has propelled the stock well above all key moving averages. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Integrated Proteins Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 99.10 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil sector, achieved a significant milestone on 24 Apr 2026 by reaching its all-time high stock price of Rs.99.10. This marks a remarkable ascent for the company, reflecting sustained gains over recent months and years amid a bullish technical trend. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Shivalik Bimetal Controls Ltd Surges 7.95% to Day's High of Rs 559.45 — Outperforms Sector by 6.12 Percentage Points
item.description: While the Sensex declined sharply by 0.98% on 24 Apr 2026, Shivalik Bimetal Controls Ltd surged 7.95%, touching an intraday high of Rs 559.45. This 6.12 percentage-point outperformance over its Iron & Steel Products sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Tech Mahindra Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 24 Apr 2026
item.description: Tech Mahindra Ltd. experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,375.25, reflecting a 3.18% drop as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral underperformance. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Surges 5.98% to Day's High of Rs 1699 — Outperforms Sector by 1.76 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 0.85% on 24 Apr 2026, while Cochin Shipyard Ltd surged 5.98%, marking a 6.67% intraday high at Rs 1699. This 4.5-percentage-point outperformance over the Ship Building sector’s 4.22% gain highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally within a broadly weak market environment. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 221.05 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd, a prominent player in the Capital Markets sector, achieved a significant milestone on 24 April 2026 by reaching its all-time high stock price. This landmark event reflects the company’s robust performance and sustained upward momentum in the market. Time: 47 minutes ago
